description_long: This is a modern, compact two-seater sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in a dark, solid-colored fabric. The sofa features two large, plush seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which appear to be loose and generously padded for comfort. Two smaller, square throw pillows are placed at each end, adding both comfort and a touch of symmetry. The armrests are straight, low-profile, and padded, seamlessly integrated into the sofa's rectangular silhouette. The sofa stands on four slender, tapered legs with a dark metallic finish, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The overall look is contemporary and versatile, suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or stylish outdoor patios.
description: A modern, dark-colored two-seater sofa with plush cushions, straight padded armrests, and slim metallic legs. Its minimalist design and solid upholstery make it ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows two large seat and back cushions, two throw pillows, and straight padded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sofa's depth, the thickness of the cushions, and the slim profile of the armrest and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous backrest and the clean, unadorned back panel with both back cushions visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and leg design from the opposite angle.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions, with two smaller throw pillows at each end; all cushions are uniform in size and shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile padded armrests integrated into the sofa's rectangular frame, matching the upholstery with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, tapered legs positioned at the corners, finished in dark metal, slightly angled for stability and a modern look.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two loose back cushions; no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, dark-colored fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
